title: New Service Order
description: Form to create a new service order for a customer, capturing work items, location, and scheduling details.

elements.intent: Associate this order with an existing customer; pre-filled if arriving from customer list
Record the date the order is being created; defaults to today
Set the urgency of this service order to influence scheduling queue
Capture the address where the service will be performed
List all services and parts being included in the order, each with quantity and unit price
Show running subtotal, tax, and grand total calculated from line items
Capture any special instructions or internal notes for technicians
Submit the form and create the order; navigates to the invoice detail view
Return to the customer list without saving

conversation_history.changes: Added customer selector, service location, line items table with totals, and notes field
